arts.ttl: Diogo Jota makes brutally honest Liverpool admission after 'a few complications'
arts.sum: Diogo Jota has endured an injury hit season despite Liverpool's success under Arne Slot

arts.ttl: Liverpool handed major new injury boost for blockbuster PSG decider
arts.sum: Arne Slot confirms good news for Reds as they look to defend 1-0 lead in Champions League last-16 second-leg showdown

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'More Likely' to Sign 'Incredible' PL Striker Than Rafael Leao
arts.sum: Liverpool are unlikely to pursue AC Milan forward Rafael Leao and could instead explore a move for a Premier League-proven forward.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah and Trent Alexander-Arnold in tense training ground moment before PSG clash
arts.sum: Liverpool stars Mohamed Salah and Trent Alexander-Arnold came together in a jokey fashion during training ahead of the Reds' Champions League semi-final second leg against PSG

arts.ttl: Alisson Becker, Arne Slot could break Champions League records in Liverpool-PSG second leg
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot and goalkeeper Alisson Becker are both capable of making Champions League history against Paris Saint-Germain on Tuesday night.
Paris Saint-Germain forward Khvicha Kvaratskhelia has described his team's visit to Anfield in the Champions League as the "most important" game of their season.

arts.ttl: Why PSG's Champions League tie with Liverpool is far from over
arts.sum: Liverpool may seemingly have one foot in the Champions League quarter-finals after last week's 1-0 win at Paris Saint-Germain but Arne Slot's side would be making a huge mistake if they were to underestimate the task facing them when the Ligue 1 champions visit Anfield for the return meeting on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Liverpool receive major injury boost as star returns to training ahead of important week for Arne Slot's team with Carabao Cup final looming
arts.sum: Liverpool have received a major boost with a key star returning to training. It is a major week for Arne Slot's team, who host Paris Saint-Germain on Tuesday in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool watch 'bullet fast' right-back who could be the ideal Trent Alexander-Arnold replacement
arts.sum: TBR Football understands that Flamengo are ready to sell their highly-rated right-back Wesley Franca this summer with a host of Premier League clubs, including Liverpool,...

arts.ttl: Liverpool star on cloud nine after being mobbed in Sainsbury's shopping trip for toilet roll
arts.sum: Harvey Elliott has revealed how he was mobbed by Liverpool fans in his local Sainsbury's after his late heroics against Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League
